prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Recurrent hypoglycemia symptoms with irregular meals (about once weekly).

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Repaglinide 1mg three times daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 104.7 kg; Height 175.7 cm; BMI 33.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/68 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 212mg/dL; 9 months ago 184mg/dL; 6 months ago 179mg/dL; 3 months ago 162mg/dL; current 173mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 106.1kg; 9 months ago 101.2kg; 6 months ago 99.1kg; 3 months ago 98.8kg; current 104.7kg), Height (12 months ago 175.7cm; 9 months ago 175.7cm; 6 months ago 175.7cm; 3 months ago 175.7cm; current 175.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 68mmHg; current 68mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 56U/L; 9 months ago 58U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 46U/L; current 61U/L), AST (12 months ago 43U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 38U/L; current 50U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 5.1mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 4.8mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 3.6mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 3.6mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 320mg/g; 9 months ago 298mg/g; 6 months ago 303mg/g; 3 months ago 311mg/g; current 325mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 159mg/dL; 9 months ago 179mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 160mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
